challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description:
Sada je vreme da vidimo rezultate.

Počnite sa dodavanjem console.log() i sekvencu karaktera "Result of trimming whitespace from both ends:".

Zatim ispod console.log(), dodaj console.log() još jedan sa varijablom cleanedInput.

hooks.beforeEach:
const spy = __helpers.spyOn(console, 'log');
const getLogs = () => spy.calls.map(call => call?.[0]);

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da ukucate niz znakova "Result of trimming whitespace from both ends:" u konzolu.
tests.testString: assert.equal(getLogs()[2], "Result of trimming whitespace from both ends:");

challengeFiles.name: script
